import React from 'react'; import { FileText, ArrowRight, AlertCircle } from 'lucide-react'; import Card from './Card'; const PleadingCard = ({ title, description, date, status, details }) => { const [isExpanded, setIsExpanded] = React.useState(false); return (

{title}

{description}

{date}

{status}
setIsExpanded(!isExpanded)} > {isExpanded ? 'Hide details' : 'View details'}
{isExpanded && details && (
{details}
)} ); }; const PleadingsPage = () => { const pleadings = [ { title: "42-B Eligibility Check", description: "Initial verification process for 42-B eligibility", date: "Standard Protocol", status: "Important", details: (

Before proceeding with pleadings:

  • Check if client has been in the US for 10 years
  • Contact Diana and/or Susana to confirm if client wants dismissal or 42-B
  • For dismissal cases, proceed with regular pleadings
  • For 42-B cases, review Paragraph 6 requirements
) }, { title: "Case Type Guidelines", description: "Procedures for different case types and locations", date: "Updated: January 2024", status: "Standard", details: (

Important Notes

  • Withholding only cases: No NTA or pleadings required
  • Removal cases: NTA present, pleadings may be required
  • San Francisco cases: No coversheets needed

Extra declarations required for:

  • Concord
  • Houston
  • IJ Haer of Atlanta – Peachtree
  • San Francisco
) }, { title: "NTA Response Templates", description: "Templates for responding to Notice to Appear", date: "Added: December 2023", status: "New", details: (

Defective NTA Responses:

  • Line 1: "Denies proper service of the Notice to Appear based on a defective NTA."
  • Line 3: "Denies all allegations based on a defective NTA."
  • Line 4: "Denies removability based on a defective NTA."

Valid NTA Responses:

  • Line 1: "Concedes proper service."
  • Line 3: Refer to specific allegations
  • Line 4: "Concedes removability."
) }, { title: "Special Cases", description: "Guidelines for Cuban, Venezuelan, Haitian, and Ukrainian cases", date: "Updated: January 2024", status: "Updated", details: (

Cuban Cases:

  • Check birth certificate and NTA
  • Verify parole/humanitarian parole status in contract
  • Look for I-131 form in "Hearings & Apps"

TPS Eligible Cases (Entry before 08/01/2023):

  • Venezuelan nationals
  • Haitian nationals
  • Ukrainian nationals
  • Check for I-821 TPS form
) }, { title: "42-B Eligibility Check", description: "Initial verification process for 42-B eligibility", date: "Standard Protocol", status: "Important", details: (

Before proceeding with pleadings:

  • Check if client has been in the US for 10 years
  • Contact Diana and/or Susana to confirm if client wants dismissal or 42-B
  • For dismissal cases, proceed with regular pleadings
  • For 42-B cases, review Paragraph 6 requirements
) }, ]; return (

Pleadings

Access comprehensive information about legal pleadings, including templates, guidelines, and best practices for various types of legal documents.

{pleadings.map((pleading, index) => ( ))}
); }; export default PleadingsPage;
